description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can with a blue and white geometric label design, featuring bold Cyrillic text and a prominent triangular motif. The can has a standard pull tab on top, typical of beverage cans, and the label wraps seamlessly around the body. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible dents or damage. The label includes detailed product information and a list of ingredients in Russian, suggesting it is a dairy-based beverage. The can's size and proportions are consistent with a typical 400g beverage can, making it easy to hold and transport. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a focus on clear typography and geometric shapes.
description: A blue and white aluminum can with bold Cyrillic text and geometric label design, featuring a smooth, glossy surface and a standard pull tab.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the can with intersecting blue and white geometric shapes and partial Cyrillic text near the top.
description_view_1: This view displays the back of the can, highlighting a block of Russian text listing ingredients and product details within a blue triangular frame.
description_view_2: This angle reveals more of the side label, with additional Cyrillic text and the continuation of the geometric blue and white pattern.
description_view_3: The front view features the main product name in bold white Cyrillic letters on a blue background, with weight and standard information below.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features bold geometric shapes in blue and white, with large, clear Cyrillic typography and a triangular motif. The design is modern and minimalistic, focusing on strong color contrast and clean lines.
